summary: Iter34 Quick Wins P1 (UTM upsell, waitlist admin alert, reset-demo-data) + Onboarding Tour verified. Backend 16/16 pytest passed including idempotency/cooldown for waitlist admin alert and permission checks on reset-demo. Frontend E2E confirmed: onboarding tour renders for users without completed flag, disappears after POST /auth/onboarding/complete (status endpoint returns completed=true); Reset demo data button visible in expanded tenant card with Trash2 icon and red color (#dc2626).
critical_code_review_comments: waitlist_alert_service.maybe_alert_superadmin: cooldown uses ISO string comparison ($gte cutoff_iso) which works today because all sent_at are written with timezone.utc but breaks if any historical row was stored with different tz format. Safer: store sent_at as datetime (BSON) and query with datetime objects.

routers/superadmin.reset_demo_data: operation is not transactional — if products.delete_many succeeds but subsequent delete_many fails, state becomes inconsistent. For a super-admin destructive op, consider wrapping in try/except and returning partial counts with a warning flag.

email_service.send_upsell_unmet_demand uses app_url default 'https://app.inmobot.com' when APP_URL env missing; preview env now has APP_URL set. Consider logging a warning when falling back so staging links don't silently point to prod.

OnboardingTour does not pre-check auth state; the GET /auth/onboarding/status is called regardless (unauth users get 401 logged). Consider gating the effect on presence of auth token to avoid noise in Sentry.
test_credentials: admin@inmobot.com / Admin123! (superadmin), demo@inmobot.com / Demo123! (demo admin) — confirmed in /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: Tests insert/delete TEST_tenant_* and TEST_prod_* in tenants/product_waitlist/waitlist_admin_alerts collections; cleanup executed in finally block. Also test_reset_real_tenant deleted products/waitlist/leads for demo-inmobiliaria (tenant remains, data was already empty from previous iterations).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter34 QuickWins complete. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_iter34_quickwins.py (16 tests). Key endpoints: GET/POST /api/auth/onboarding/status|complete, POST /api/superadmin/upsell/run, POST /api/superadmin/tenants/{id}/reset-demo-data (body: {confirm, include_leads}; 400 if no confirm, 404 unknown tenant, 403 non-superadmin, 200 with counts). waitlist_admin_alerts collection auto-created on first alert; env vars WAITLIST_ADMIN_ALERT_THRESHOLD (default 20) and WAITLIST_ADMIN_ALERT_COOLDOWN_DAYS (default 30). Frontend: onboarding tour data-testids (onboarding-tour, onboarding-skip, onboarding-next, onboarding-prev, onboarding-progress); reset-demo button testid reset-demo-{tenant_id} only visible when tenant card is expanded (click the tenant header). Superadmin account had onboarding auto-completed via API during testing.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. Initial confusion: onboarding-skip button wasn't reachable on first attempt due to stale DOM render state on rapid navigation; workaround was to call POST /auth/onboarding/complete directly via page.evaluate+fetch, then reload. This is test-harness mechanics, not a product bug — real users can click the × (onboarding-skip) once the intro card finishes its fade-in animation.
